textByHash.d9ba38c182bce533d7d1631b63a287ca4ae3aaa2: How did YOU get in here?
textByHash.bb88405e8069070ac4fe6397cebe4e36b4c007bc: I thought I made it clear to the butler you could not be allowed to interfere with our mission. The incompetent fool must be going soft.
textByHash.1985f99ca2ae6988a9c720f2ce39f339ae535d40: Well you won't live long enough to tell anyone! DIE!!!
textByHash.86e530fd519dbf962cafa6bc8b5b7fea0dae1876: Out of my way idiot! We are preparing matters your puny mind could not hope to understand!
textByHash.53a6af5820852e721ed5ad84051aadc3003714f2: I have no time to waste with the likes of you do-gooder.
textByHash.a41c941a0e47243d36b62c93e37f4fc79aa3cbed: Well well well... So we have a new recruit. Clivet told me of your desire to join us in our glorious task to resurrect the mighty Hazeel from his slumber.
textByHash.4d9a4d7194a53231b44ca1aeb47617b79236a53d: To accomplish this, we require the ancient words of summoning which will restore his shattered body, so that he can bring vengeance upon his enemies.
textByHash.a15fc9d1c78f6fb0fb3a5d8fba2173bd1fae60a3: Hazeel in his mighty cunning anticipated that he might be defeated and secured within his home somewhere a powerful magical scroll that could restore him.
textByHash.afd6c1f9475d9ab7582ab0e0a81707b0bfc1ed68: The words to this powerful enchantment are hidden within the Carnillean mansion, right under the nose of his unsuspecting foes. We already have an agent in place there
textByHash.51e671fa4cf30344cd6fa1e15b684d1022d8008a: in their Butler Jones, a faithful follower to Hazeel. His loyalty to Hazeel is beyond questioning, yet he has been unsuccessful in locating the scroll containing the spell so far.
textByHash.6e933d1f19795bef4686180435a2846f5b8d2bdd: Go back to the mansion, and assist us in finding this enchantment, so that together we can restore Hazeel to his true power and glory!
textByHash.c2e2e58a2b6e34ca8115973766d70edf504001ac: Hazeel has waited long enough to return! It is IMPERATIVE you find that spell!
textByHash.74f11ebe30b70403a0fa3ba0eba5dc0860060392: Have you brought me the scroll of restoration to complete the ritual?
textByHash.5f9ea624072b84364309122868e233e5ea6d29eb: FINALLY! Quickly, give it to me and I will begin the ritual!
textByHash.0c33d04bb6f4562259c4d9855630a203cf0bdbb0: Yes... YES! With the words contained within this scroll our Lord shall return to this realm and bring destruction to our enemies!
textByHash.13c43f4ff7fb08cd82bbf29d9208cbbc045b154f: Watch adventurer, and witness the glorious rebirth of Hazeel!
textByHash.c405ec4144d5d458ea9a9744ee75a0627404c66f: Lord Hazeel... Lord Zamorak... I call upon the powers of evil... The forces of chaos... The strength of hatred...
textByHash.dd9f56b6803fadb6369a0f13289349aa886f60e0: Sentente sillaberi junque dithmento! Ia! Ia! dextrimon encanto! termando... imcando... solly enty rando... sentente! Ia! Ia! Indenti zaggarati g'thxa!
textByHash.435e26c560f970774dc362dcbad3608ea8f71e90: Dintenta! Sententa! Retenta! Q'exjta! Ia! Sottottott! Ia! Dysmenta junque fammatio svelken! Sottey! Sentey! SOLOMENT!
textByHash.c8ac77c837124b77e10fe84ee762d653920c5ff8: You must find it and bring it to me! Without it we cannot resurrect Hazeel and our efforts to do so will fail!
textByHash.1d84cb0a00e4e877b90e47940d61b3287bccc052: I thought I made it clear to Jones that you could not be allowed to interfere with our mission. The incompetent fool must be going soft.
textByHash.97d38b58a8d4384ef7071a6efeaa4021da0f3258: Well you won't live long enough to tell anyone! Die!
textByHash.1f447f2f7b617ada8e6afb181d259a2b703b2d1a: Well, well, well... we have a new recruit. Clivet told me of your desire to join us in our glorious task to resurrect the mighty Hazeel.
textByHash.bd53b51543ba8cf482d5442786f0d90a0aa70412: Well if all goes well, you'll play a key role in just that. Before his defeat, Hazeel secured within his home a powerful magical scroll of restoration. It remains there still, hidden to even the foolish Carnilleans.
textByHash.a9f1b7a7507cdfc58661b949695b104a1f85c473: Up to now, our attempts to recover this scroll have been met with disappointment. However, I know you will not fail us.
textByHash.6d880038be84d1251e1f8219bdbba23463f471bf: That is correct. You must return to the Carnillean Mansion and find where it is hidden. We already have an agent in place to support you.
textByHash.bfcdaaff7a4180eb3c884a9973d4c0b2989da618: Indeed. Their Butler Jones is in fact a faithful follower of Hazeel. He has been unsuccessful in locating the scroll himself, but together the two of you will find it.
textByHash.94413b79d1780cfcd5dd128f67b0fcb26329fc46: Now, go with haste. Soon we will restore Hazeel to his true power and glory!
textByHash.e8f46d204b89de114ff9eef0c7de324cbafef694: Hazeel has already waited far too long for his return. It is imperative that you find that scroll! It hides somewhere within the Carnillean Mansion.
textByHash.647b6dec8346d3eb43ce6f4f9594cc1dfbb16c9c: Have you brought the scroll of restoration?
textByHash.b6bea7a5be3255258bcdaeaa90b657780151e625: At long last! With the words contained within this scroll, our lord shall finally return to us!
textByHash.7a931fb97bedb844888bab2e03de799dc104c38c: You must find it and bring it to me! Hazeel has already waited far too long for his return.
textByHash.aa340b36ce542d1c0c962241b14ccc9c6ac42b9d: Welcome, adventurer. It's good to see you once more.
textByHash.6fc4f2fb1048051d5ded637e5418f4a6b3f38b06: I'm afraid that isn't possible. Lord Hazeel is currently busy with his glorious work in the north. It is not our place to disturb him.
textByHash.ffd949acb363753c9be330d806726209db7b521e: Jones? We have not heard from him in some time.
textByHash.126d0ec17a50ea786b5dcbd50038f245afd35b7a: He has? What joyous news! Long have we waited for those Carnillean monsters to face the consequences of their crimes!
textByHash.d490fb6b57996af0da204717b5be9004e6a7ddb5: Well... I suppose you have proven yourself to be a loyal servant to Hazeel. Still, I must warn you, our lord won't take kindly to being summoned unnecessarily.
textByHash.f376c9c06cab3eb8e06648398ea0bc294a1da88b: Very well. I will call upon the mighty Hazeel.
textByHash.e6df4370484f8b67a26b31b182c907320e72a23a: Not to my knowledge, my lord. Your loyal servant, Jones, was still stationed at the mansion, but he would not have acted without instruction.
textByHash.c5cbb7f1068d32104f67740c3a814ced23ec0eef: Forgive me, my lord, but if they aimed to frame us, why would they also try to have your restoration scroll delivered here?
textByHash.1ad0c5b8c1bfb5c622656a3ddf4c52fcd9a92c9d: Adventurer, I have summoned the mighty Hazeel as you desired. You should speak with him at once.
textByHash.f7eaa9fba133ed91fa68cf0efd33718298e83e1f: Adventurer, you should speak with Lord Hazeel and General Khazard at once.
textByHash.e9d704a9a34dede013874d8a4fcd79acc8a00cfb: Lord Hazeel has given you a task to perform. You should go with haste.
textByHash.836a0dcb6ade6141b343ac3e9ed5ec1c763d3df3: Adventurer, is your task complete? You should speak with Lord Hazeel and General Khazard if so.
textByHash.b6bfe985ac75a60e6e0b5d348698fb327a6152e4: It will be done, my lord.
textByHash.799b56f0d576c37406e942593b251b34e26257fe: Adventurer, Lord Hazeel and General Khazard require your presence in the north. You should join with them at the troll settlement there.
textByHash.0061b20f4f36b30983631669945483e7aecfc622: Welcome, adventurer. Know that as a friend to Hazeel, you are always welcome here.
